## Testing

- [ ] Local backend run (`mvn spring-boot:run`)
- [ ] Local frontend run (`npm --prefix ui run dev`)
- [ ] Backend tests (`mvn test`)
- [ ] Frontend lint/build (`npm --prefix ui run lint && npm --prefix ui run build`)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] README/docs updated where needed
- [ ] Screenshots attached for UI changes
